title: Fraud Signal Triage Playbook
text:
## Scope
Use this playbook when a return is flagged for possible fraud indicators and the case must be assessed before escalation.

## Intake Checks
Confirm the taxpayer identity, filing period, linked entities, and whether a prior signal already exists for the same subject.

## Escalation Thresholds
Escalate when multiple high-risk indicators are present, documentary evidence appears manipulated, or third-party data conflicts with the declared return.

## Handling Notes
Do not disclose investigation cues to helpdesk staff or external parties. Record the reason for escalation in the case log using the approved fraud-signal template.
